metadata.description: forge-harness — Multi-instance persona orchestration and meta-tooling marketplace for Claude Code. Harness engineering toolkit for teams that want to evolve their AI collaboration practices.

plugins.name: fh-meta
plugins.description: Hub meta-operations toolkit — 20 skills (apex-review · verify-bidirectional · cross-ecosystem-synergy-detection · plugin-recommender · hub-cc-pr-reviewer · context-doctor · sim-conductor · harness-doctor · meta-prompt-builder · field-harvest · install-doctor · install-wizard · asset-placement-gate · marketplace-gate · agent-composer · contention-layer · context-bridge-dispatch · frontier-digest · steel-quench · harvest-loop) + 3 agents (hub-persona-auditor · fact-checker · persona-innovator)

plugins.name: fh-commons
plugins.description: Project-agnostic utility skills born from the contention layer. Operates at a different layer than fh-meta (harness engineering) — domain-independent utilities that can be transplanted into any project.
